productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men's Titan White Blue Shoe
description: A FORCE TO RECKON WITH    Versatility and lightweight comfort rolled into one brings the adidas titan Bounce to you. This uber cool F50 inspired design is a force to reckon with. Crafted with BOUNCE technology for ultimate energy return, the adidas Titan Bounce is one of the most classy running shoes ever created. Feel surprised with every stride Engineered with HyperMOTION technology for a faster and more efficient ride, and coupled with maximum foot propulsion and fastest mechanical cushioning, the Adidas Titan Bounce has an adiWEAR outsole that lives longer allowing this high tech shoe do all those wondrous things to your run for years to come. The HyperMOTION technology in the Adidas Titan Bounce comprises leaf springs in the heel.These ensure the ultimate return of energy to the runner, making each stride almost effortless. The BOUNCE technology replaces the traditional foam that had bouncy and stretchy elements, and provides that adequate amount of cushioning against heelstrike, reducing impact on the balls and heels of feet. Such comfort makes it an absolute pleasure for the feet during long runs, while the stylish look of the outsole and the BOUNCE rings adds on to your style statement. With a blown rubber outsole offering lightweight grip and cushioning, and a snug Fit offered by the comfort sockliner and lace-up system, the Adidas Titan Bounce is an unparalleled running shoe ever created.UpperWhite synthetic uppers provide comfort and protectionSynthetic lace-ups give better fitPlacement of iconic three stripes symbolizing elegance and durability in black on the sidesPadded collar and tongue provide all day comfortMolded respoEVA/sockliner give anatomical fit MidsoleShock-absorbing lightweight Phylon midsole for added comfortOutsoleBOUNCE technology provides optimum energy returnHyperMOTION with leaf springs on the heel return energy with every stepadiWEAR outsole provides increased durabilityWash careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
